## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Croissant;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Croissant { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
bakery, cooking, food, pastry

## Categories
food-beverage

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/croissant)
